## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy expanding to include construction use cases, AI-powered automation, and industry-specific solutions](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [SEO performance showing positive trends, with increases in impressions and clicks for key topics](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Link building efforts progressing as planned, with open rates improving after infrastructure changes](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Thiago emphasizing the importance of aligning marketing content with product capabilities and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Expanding content to cover construction safety, compliance, and software integrations](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Positive SEO performance with increases in impressions and clicks, especially for AI agent sub-topics](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Automation and insurance categories performing well](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [New page templates proposed for industry-specific use cases, linking to connector pages](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

### Product-Marketing Alignment

  - [Thiago stressed the importance of tying marketing content directly to product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Suggestion to organize content around AI agents and their supported use cases](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Need to minimize the gap between perceived and realizable value for potential customers](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Link Building and Domain Authority

  - [Link building progressing as planned, with 18 links in progress](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Email open rates improved from 15% to 45% after infrastructure changes](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Discussion on the importance of high-quality backlinks and domain authority growth](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

### Social Media and Video Content

  - [Thiago's LinkedIn engagement increasing with regular posting (82,000 impressions recently)](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2215.0)
  - [Video content performing well, especially product demos and contrarian takes](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
  - [Suggestion to incorporate videos into website content for improved engagement](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)

### Documentation and SEO

  - [AI-generated documentation for connectors now available](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2464.0)
  - [Discussion on moving documentation from subdomain to main domain for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
  - [Potential need to beef up .com site with more content](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2603.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and provide feedback on the construction case study shared in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Implement new page templates for industry-specific use cases, starting with insurance](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Explore options for incorporating product documentation into the main website domain](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
  - [Continue creating and sharing video content, especially for high-performing topics](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
  - [Investigate solutions for moving data from Notion to Webflow for documentation](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - [Consider building a centralized hub for AI agent templates and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/vcaDj4YAq722qsbE8GTU_xEZy9gXw8BN?tab=summary&timestamp=2553.0)
